tasks.shot1_code:
(set tokens (split $0 " "))
(set counts {})
(for-each tok tokens
  (map_inc counts tok))
(set sorted (sort_by (entries counts) (\(k v) (neg v))))
(set top_k (slice sorted 0 #1))
(set result [])
(for-each pair top_k
  (push result (first pair)))
(println (join result " "))

(set order [])
(for-each word words (\w
  (if (not (in w order))

(set unique_order (reverse (uniq (reverse order))))
(println (join unique_order " "))

    (set prefix (string_slice prefix 0 i))))

tasks.shot1_code:
(set a $0)
(set b $1)
(set len_a (len a))
(set len_b (len b))

(fn one_substitution x string y string -> bool
  (set diff_count 0)
  (for i 0 len_a
    (if (ne (char_at x i) (char_at y i))
      (set diff_count (+ diff_count 1)))
  (eq diff_count 1))

(fn one_insertion_or_deletion shorter string longer string -> bool
  (set diff_count 0)
  (for i 0 (len shorter)
    (if (ne (char_at shorter i) (char_at longer (+ i diff_count)))
      (begin
        (set diff_count (+ diff_count 1))
        (if (gt diff_count 1)
          (ret false)))))
  (le diff_count 1))

(if (eq a b)
  (println "no")
  (else
    (cond
      ((eq len_a len_b) (if (one_substitution a b) (println "yes") (else (println "no"))))
      ((eq (+ len_a 1) len_b) (if (one_insertion_or_deletion a b) (println "yes") (else (println "no"))))
      ((eq (- len_a 1) len_b) (if (one_insertion_or_deletion b a) (println "yes") (else (println "no"))))
      (true (println "no")))))

tasks.shot1_code:
(set candidate string $0)
(set target string $1)

(fn is_subsequence a string b string -> bool
  (set i int 0)
  (for-each c (chars a)
    (while (and (lt i (len b)) (ne c (string_get b i)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    (if (ge i (len b))
      (ret false)))
  (ret true))

(if (is_subsequence candidate target)
  (println "yes")
  (else
    (println "no")))
